compiled_state.title: Integrate Gate 1a into fix-bug SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Add Gate 1a (intent search) section to plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md at Step 1.5 (between Score/Classify and Investigation Dispatch). The section:

- Reads debug.intent_search_budget via read-config.sh (default 20)
- Dispatches subagent_type: dso:intent-search with bug ticket ID and budget
- Parses gate signal JSON response (conforming to gate-signal-schema.md)
- Routes based on outcome:
  - intent-aligned (triggered: false, confidence: high/medium) -> proceed to investigation without dialog
  - intent-contradicting (triggered: true) -> auto-close bug with:
    1. .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <id> "Intent-contradicting: <evidence summary>"
    2. .claude/scripts/dso ticket transition <id> open closed --reason="Fixed: Intent-contradicting — <evidence source>"
  - ambiguous (triggered: false, confidence: low) -> fall through to Gate 1b
- Handles agent failure gracefully: if dispatch fails or returns malformed signal, treat as ambiguous (fail toward dialog)

TDD: GREEN — implement until Task 3 RED tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All RED tests now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_1a.py -q
- [ ] SKILL.md contains Gate 1a section
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 1a' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md || grep -q 'Intent Search' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate dispatches intent-search agent
  Verify: grep -q 'intent-search' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Auto-close uses correct --reason prefix (Critical Rule 19)
  Verify: grep -q 'Fixed: Intent-contradicting' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Graceful degradation documented for agent failure
  Verify: grep -qi 'malformed\|dispatch fail\|graceful' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
